BCCI Calls Sudden Meeting With Gambhir, Agarkar Ahead of 2nd ODI

Dec 1, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

BCCI Calls Sudden Meeting With Gambhir, Agarkar Ahead of 2nd ODI

The Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI) has convened an urgent meeting with former players Gautam Gambhir and Ajit Agarkar, along with senior officials, to discuss key selection matters ahead of the 2nd ODI against South Africa.

The discussions are expected to focus on team composition, strategy, and planning for the upcoming match, as the Indian side looks to bounce back after a challenging start to the series.

You can read the full original article on 8JJ Sports.com here:
👉 BCCI Calls Sudden Meeting With Gambhir, Agarkar Ahead of 2nd ODI
